mapper.select: select id, tenant_id as tenantId, supplier_id as supplierId, scm_supplier_code as scmSupplierCode, remark, del_flag as delFlag, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime from spd_scm_supplier_bind where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and supplier_id = #{supplierId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1

select id, tenant_id as tenantId, supplier_id as supplierId, scm_supplier_code as scmSupplierCode, remark, del_flag as delFlag, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime from spd_scm_supplier_bind where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and del_flag = '0' order by supplier_id

select scm_supplier_code from spd_scm_supplier_bind where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and supplier_id = #{supplierId} and del_flag = '0' and scm_supplier_code is not null and trim(scm_supplier_code) != '' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into spd_scm_supplier_bind(id, tenant_id, supplier_id, scm_supplier_code, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time) values(#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{supplierId}, #{scmSupplierCode}, #{remark}, '0', #{createBy}, now())
mapper.update: update spd_scm_supplier_bind set scm_supplier_code = #{scmSupplierCode}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and supplier_id = #{supplierId} and del_flag = '0'
